module.description: Declare a found item from a stay — the guest is emailed. Guests can also report lost or found items from the booklet.
surface.host.main.title: Lost & found
surface.host.main.subtitle: Guests can report lost or found items from the booklet anytime.
host.main.banner: This module adds a « Declare a found item » button on each stay detail. You describe the item; the guest receives an email to arrange return. The note below is included in that email.
host.main.help: Optional tip included in the found-item email — e.g. return policy, shipping costs.
host.main.emptyRecent: No declared items for this property yet.
host.main.status.label: Status
host.hostNote.label: Message for the guest (optional)
host.hostNote.placeholder: e.g. We ship forgotten items within 7 days; shipping is at your expense.
home.card.title: Lost & found
home.card.intro: Lost something or found an item? Tell your host — they will follow up.
home.card.thanks: Thanks — your host has been notified.
home.card.error.title: Reporting temporarily unavailable
home.card.error.description: The form could not be loaded. Try again in a moment.
form.kind.label: Type
form.itemDescription.label: What is it?
form.contactHint.label: How to reach you (optional)
form.details.label: Details
module.status.incomplete.title: Incomplete configuration
module.status.incomplete.description: Finish the module in the host dashboard
module.status.inactive.title: Lost & found disabled
module.status.inactive.description: This module is not active on this property
